title: Incorrect URL in invite links
symptom: Generated invite links are incorrectly pointing to an HTTP URL instead of the expected HTTPS URL. This can cause confusion and accessibility issues.
not_this_if: Invite links are generated correctly after environment variable changes
root_cause: The invite links generated by n8n rely on specific environment variables to determine the correct URL. If these variables are not set correctly, n8n defaults to a standard HTTP URL, which may not match the intended configuration.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable WEBHOOK_URL to the correct HTTPS URL
Ensure N8N_HOST is also set correctly
Wait for a few moments to see if the changes take effect
If issues persist, try manually changing the invite link
agent_instruction: Set the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable to the correct HTTPS URL and verify the changes.
